s: In 2018, Justin Anderson suited up for LAA as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 4.070, WHIP 1.480, SO 67, WAR 0.500.
In 2019, Justin Anderson suited up for LAA as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 5.550, WHIP 1.570, SO 60, WAR 0.300.
Changed teams after the previous season (LAA -> CHW).
In 2024, Justin Anderson suited up for CHW as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 4.390, WHIP 1.500, SO 57, WAR 0.200. Notable context: Joined CHW.
